description_long: This object consists of three black swords of varying lengths, each featuring a straight, double-edged blade with a pointed tip. The largest sword has a pronounced, wide crossguard and a long, slightly contoured handle, while the two smaller swords have shorter, simpler guards and handles. All three blades are sleek and uniform in color, with a glossy, metallic finish that reflects light. The handles appear to be solid and cylindrical, possibly made of the same material as the blades, and lack any visible wrapping or grip texture. The crossguards are angular and functional, providing hand protection without ornate detailing. There are no visible engravings, inlays, or decorative elements on any part of the swords.
description: A set of three sleek, black, double-edged swords with pointed tips and angular crossguards, featuring glossy metallic surfaces and simple, unadorned handles.
description_view_0: Three swords of different lengths are shown from the front, highlighting their straight blades, angular crossguards, and cylindrical handles.
description_view_1: The swords are viewed edge-on, showing the thinness of the blades and the straight alignment of the handles.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the backs of the three swords, mirroring the front but with less detail visible on the crossguards.
description_view_3: Another edge-on view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the slim profile and straightness of the blades.
